turns.q: Can I change the shipping address on an order I just placed?
turns.replyTail:
id:

Can I change the shipping address on an order I just placed?

04:15 AM

Hi! We are not able to edit the shipping address on an order once it has been placed. If your order was placed within the last hour, you can cancel it from your order confirmation page or in your account under My Orders, then place a new order with the correct address: https://beekman1802.com/account/login

Please log in so we can check your order details and see what is still possible. 💛

04:15 AM
Verify order details

turns.q: Can I cancel an order after placing it, and is there a time window?
turns.replyTail:
placing it, and is there a time window?

04:15 AM

Yes. Orders can be canceled within 1 hour after they are placed.

You can cancel from your order confirmation page or from your account under My Orders: https://beekman1802.com/account/login

After the 1-hour window, the order can no longer be canceled. If that happens, you can refuse the package at delivery or at your local carrier facility for a refund.

If you log in, we can check your order details for you. 💛

04:16 AM
Verify order details

turns.q: Can I add an item to an order I already placed?
turns.replyTail:
add an item to an order I already placed?

04:16 AM

Orders cannot be edited after they are placed, so items cannot be added to an existing order.

If your order is still within 1 hour of being placed, you can cancel it from your order confirmation page or in your account under My Orders, then place a new order with the additional item: https://beekman1802.com/account/login

If you log in, we can check whether your order is still within that cancellation window. 💛

04:16 AM
Verify order details

ogin

04:16 AM
4:16 AM. You said:

What happens if it already shipped — can it still be changed?

04:16 AM

If it has already shipped, it can no longer be changed or canceled. You can refuse the package at delivery or with your local carrier for a refund.

If you log in, we can check your order details and confirm its status for you: https://beekman1802.com/account/login 💛

04:16 AM
Verify order details

turns.q: How do I update my contact or account details?
turns.replyTail:
?

04:16 AM

You can update most account details by logging in here: https://beekman1802.com/account/login

For your default shipping or billing address, go to Account Details or Addresses, update the information, and save.

If you need to update a subscription address, log in, go to Subscriptions, find the subscription, click Manage, and update the shipping address there.

If you want to change the email address on your account, please send the new email address you would like to use.

04:17 AM

4:17 AM. You said:

If I cancel, how long until I'm refunded?

04:17 AM

If the order is canceled, the refund goes back to your original payment method. Once processed, it can take 5 to 10 business days to appear, depending on your bank.

Please log in so we can check your specific order details. 💛
